mapper.select:
SELECT c.*, cust.id as customer_id, cust.related_company_name, -- 消费金额：该客户所有订单的金额总和 IFNULL(order_stats.total_spending, 0) as total_spending, -- 业务标签：该客户所有订单的业务类型（去重） order_stats.business_tags as business_tag, -- 订单数量 IFNULL(order_stats.order_count, 0) as customer_order_count, -- 服务月数：从最早订单到现在的月数 IFNULL(order_stats.service_months, 0) as service_months, -- 是否有高端业务 order_stats.has_high_end_business, -- 是否有科小业务 order_stats.has_kexiao_business FROM gh_accounting_contract c LEFT JOIN gh_customer cust ON c.company_name = cust.corporate_name AND cust.del_flag = 0 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT o.company_id, o.company_name, SUM(IFNULL(o.contract_amount, IFNULL(o.order_amount, 0))) as total_spending, COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) as order_count, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT o.business_type) as business_type_ids, -- 业务标签需要后续通过字典服务转换 '' as business_tags, -- 服务月数：从最早订单创建时间到现在 TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, MIN(o.create_time), NOW()) as service_months, -- 是否有高端业务（需要通过字典服务判断） 0 as has_high_end_business, -- 是否有科小业务（需要通过字典服务判断） 0 as has_kexiao_business FROM gh_order o WHERE o.del_flag = 0 GROUP BY o.company_id, o.company_name ) order_stats ON ( (cust.id IS NOT NULL AND order_stats.company_id = cust.id) OR (cust.id IS NULL AND order_stats.company_name = c.company_name) )
c.del_flag = 0
AND ${ew.sqlSegment}
ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
